title: MaintenanceRun
description: One scheduled steward maintenance run — the autolearn chain node (agency/capabilities/develop/_main.py develop.maintain; Spec 153 Slice 6 coverage). PRECEDES the next run so the loop learns across schedules.

focus.description: The run's focus hint ('auto' when unscoped).

status.description: Run state: 'open' on mint, advanced as the run selects + ships.

selected.description: The candidate the run chose to work this cycle ('' until phase 1 picks).

next_candidate.description: The highest-impact move handed to the next run ('' until phase 5 ranks).
